subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam Qabl-Ḥusayn! Thou art remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and He maketh mention of thee and biddeth thee to wisdom in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل حسین ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و هو یذکرک و یامرک بالحکمه فی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @exhortations and counsels
